cases.description: Round-trip the canonical Preview3 SESSION_OPEN fixed metadata vector, including schema defaults, lease hints, and resume/auth block lengths.
Round-trip the canonical Preview3 SESSION_OPEN_ACK metadata vector, including granted credits, route_scope_id, and session_flags_ack bits.
Round-trip the canonical Preview3 SESSION_CLOSE fixed metadata vector with draining policy and last_operation_id waterline.
Round-trip the canonical Preview3 SESSION_CLOSE_ACK fixed metadata vector for draining-to-closed state transitions.
Round-trip the canonical Preview3 FLOW_UPDATE packet vector with session-scope credit routing, retry-after, and backpressure flags.
Round-trip the canonical Preview3 connection-scope FLOW_UPDATE packet vector and preserve connection_credit-only routing semantics.
Round-trip the canonical Preview3 operation-scope FLOW_UPDATE packet vector with non-zero operation_id, retry-after, and drain_in_flight_only behavior.
Round-trip the canonical Preview3 SESSION_OPEN resume-request metadata vector, including resume token length and resumed-session defaults.
Round-trip the canonical Preview3 SESSION_OPEN_ACK resumed metadata vector and preserve the resumed session_status semantics.
Round-trip the canonical Preview3 SESSION_OPEN_ACK resume-rejected metadata vector and preserve the stable resume_rejected error code.
Round-trip the canonical Preview3 32-byte schema descriptor header vector, including schema_flags and default stream semantics.
Round-trip the canonical Preview3 cache_error_code raw wire values and preserve the frozen cache_miss, lease_expired, version_mismatch, dependency_invalid, and schema_mismatch family assignments.

Round-trip the canonical Preview3 schema_error_code raw wire values and preserve the frozen schema_unknown, schema_version_unknown, schema_hash_conflict, schema_incompatible, schema_dependency_missing, and schema_update_rejected assignments.
Round-trip the canonical Preview3 24-byte typed payload descriptor vector, including partial semantics and schema binding fields.
